<!--
If you're publishing from the SkyrimNet dashboard, this template is filled in for you.
If you're submitting manually, please complete each section below.
-->

## Plugin details

- **Title:**
- **Slug:** `plugins/<your-github-username>/<plugin-slug>/`
- **Type of change:**
  - [ ] New plugin
  - [ ] Update to an existing plugin I own
- **Contents included:**
  - [ ] Triggers
  - [ ] Actions
  - [ ] Prompts

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences about what this plugin does. -->

## Testing

<!-- Briefly describe how you tested this plugin in-game. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My plugin directory is under `plugins/<my-github-username>/<slug>/`
- [ ] I did not modify `index.json`, `curated.json`, or files outside my plugin directory
- [ ] My `manifest.json` validates against `schemas/manifest.schema.json`
- [ ] My `nsfw` flag accurately reflects the content
- [ ] (If actions included) I filled in every `invocation` field and signed the attestation
- [ ] (If actions included) I understand manual review may take up to a week
